title: Trade Federation Battleship (aquatic)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:TFBattleBoat.png|thumb|right|250px|A Trade Federation battleship on [[Maramere]]]]

The '''Trade Federation Battleship''', not to be confused with the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] space-faring [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleship]], was a large ship built for the Trade Federation's aquatic naval forces.

The battleship was deployed as a starfighter transport, capable of launching waves of [[Scarab-class starfighter/Legends|''Scarab''-class droid starfighters]], [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droid starfighters]], and [[Trade Federation droid bomber]]s. These vessels carried droid control signals with a limited range, meaning that any Vulture droids caught out of its radius were instantly destroyed.

==History==
[[File:TF_Battleship_EoR.jpg|thumb|left|250px|A battleship in the [[Jenuwaa Sea]] on [[Kalee/Legends|Kalee]]]]
[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] used a battleship to cross the [[Jenuwaa Sea]] on [[Kalee/Legends|Kalee]] to retrieve [[Grievous/Legends|Qymaen jai Sheelal]] following his shuttle crash. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] encountered two battleships on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Maramere]] prior to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], and, aided by [[Reti]], [[Nym/Legends|Nym]], and [[Jinkins]], succeeded in destroying both.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=The Eyes of Revolution|book=Star Wars: Visionaries}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
